faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about Catan Board Generator and how it works.

items.question: What is Catan Board Generator?
items.answer: Catan Board Generator is an online tool that creates random board layouts for Settlers of Catan. It supports both Classic and Expansion versions, allowing you to generate unique and balanced boards for your games.

items.question: How does the generation algorithm work?
items.answer: Our algorithm randomly places resources and number tokens on the hex grid while respecting your custom rules. It ensures fair distribution and can be configured to allow or restrict certain tile adjacencies.

items.question: What game versions are supported?
items.answer: We support both the Classic Catan version (3-4 players) and the Expansion version (5-6 players). Each version has its own board configuration and layout options.

items.question: Can I customize the generation rules?
items.answer: Yes! You can configure multiple rules including whether 6&8 dots can touch, whether 2&12 can touch, whether same numbers can be adjacent, and whether same resource types can touch.

items.question: Is the board generation fair and balanced?
items.answer: Our algorithm is designed to create balanced boards with fair resource distribution. However, you can also adjust the rules to create more challenging or unbalanced layouts if desired.

items.question: Can I save and share generated boards?
items.answer: Yes! You can export your board configuration and share the setup with friends. This makes it easy to prepare games in advance or replay interesting layouts.

cta.title: Ready to Generate Your Catan Board?
